title: Assertion fault when multi-use subquery implemented by co-routine
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE musicians (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, genre VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE songs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, musician_id INTEGER REFERENCES musicians(id));
INSERT INTO musicians (name, genre) VALUES ('Artist A', 'Rock'), ('Artist B', 'Jazz');
SELECT * FROM musicians WHERE id IN (SELECT musician_id FROM songs WHERE title LIKE 'Song%') AND genre IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Using co-routines to implement a subquery multiple times
